command.theme: Weekly build update on the open mission-planner beta
command.notes: Lead with the concrete change shipped this week and what it unblocks for builders. One verified fact (the trajectory solver now runs offline). Plainspoken, no hype.

exercises: on-voice: brand-specific anchor (the offline trajectory solver) — not generic category copy
fact-safety: one falsifiable claim that traces to project context
structure: leads with the shipped change, not a status recap
reviewer_note: A clean, representative build update. Should clear the gate and read on-voice. Use it as the baseline of what 'us' sounds like.
